_meta.title: Short label shown in the preset dropdown, e.g. 'Acme — Digital Concierge'
_meta.note: Freeform note for your teammates. This whole _meta block is ignored by the app.

clientDesc: Acme is a fictional retail chain with 500+ stores. Their contact center is overwhelmed with repetitive questions about store hours, return policy, and loyalty program. We want to deploy a branded 3D mascot that answers those on the website 24/7 and deflects 60% of tier-1 tickets.
